methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $4.0B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 9 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $600M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 5.8x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Insitro
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $2.4B

data.narrative:
Ultima Genomics is a Series C-stage biotech company that has raised $700M+ and carries a current post-money valuation of $4.0B. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 9 private-sector companies at the same or adjacent stages (including Insitro at $2.4B Series C, Eikon Therapeutics at $3.3B Series B, and HistoSonics at $2.2B Series D), plus 3 public comparables in Biotech & Health.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.7x multiplier to the $4.0B last post-money, implying a valuation of $6.8B at the next funding stage. Peer-median anchoring across the 9-company cohort yields a median of $1.7B, with a range spanning $600M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied given the absence of disclosed revenue figures. The peer-median result reflects the breadth of the biotech sector; Ultima's current $4.0B sits materially above the median, consistent with its capital-raised position and market positioning within the cohort.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $1.4B (low) to $7.8B (high), with a median of $4.2B. The current $4.0B valuation sits near this central estimate. Key uncertainties include the absence of revenue data to validate public-market multiples and the heterogeneity of stage and subsector focus within the private peer set.
